topics.label: PLEASE & Politeness
topics.description: Statements must include PLEASE occasionally or the compiler refuses. Too polite also fails.

topics.label: Variables & Operators
topics.description: . (spot) for 16-bit, : (twospot) for 32-bit. Mingle ($) and select (~) operators.

topics.label: Statements
topics.description: DO, PLEASE DO, PLEASE ABSTAIN FROM, REINSTATE, COME FROM. Deliberate obfuscation.
